data.title: Walmart opens new Eastvale Supercenter at 14100 Limonite Ave, creating jobs and serving as retail destination for community.
data.description: Today, a new Walmart Supercenter opened in Eastvale, California, marking the first location in the area. The store is situated at 14100 Limonite Ave and officially opened at 8 a.m. A ceremony was held at 7:30 a.m. to acknowledge the City of Eastvale, its officials, and the store's team of associates. Jesse Gonzales, the store manager, expressed pride in expanding alongside Eastvale, providing support to local families, generating jobs, and becoming a reliable retail option moving forward.

data.title: Algorand (ALGO) Foundation appoints ex-FinCEN, MoneyGram execs to new US board. ALGO up 3.5% post Delaware move.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ALGO has surged by 3.5% after the Algorand (ALGO) Foundation announced a new board comprising former Treasury officials and fintech experts. This update comes after the foundation relocated to Delaware.

data.title: Comcast enhances broadband in public housing across MA with MBI, offering high-speed internet to residents.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Comcast, along with the Healey-Driscoll administration and the Massachusetts Technology Collaborative’s Massachusetts Broadband Institute (MBI), have revealed substantial advancements in enhancing broadband infrastructure for public and affordable housing units throughout the state. As part of the initial funding phase of the Residential Retrofit Program, these upgrades offer high-speed, symmetrical Internet access, and strong connectivity to residents in these units. State officials announced this progress, marking a significant step towards improving digital access for residents.

data.title: 2025 Gun Violence stats show progress, urge for prevention. Omnilert report highlights positive shifts in indicators.
data.description: Omnilert, based in Leesburg, Virginia, a prominent provider of AI-driven safety and emergency communication solutions, has recently published its 2025 report on Gun Violence. The report reveals positive changes in significant metrics, stressing the importance of multi-layered security measures and swift reaction to emergencies. This information was announced on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Gantry's 2025 commercial mortgage production hits $4.2 billion, 25% up YoY with $1.5 billion in Q4 alone.
data.description: In San Francisco, Gantry announced a significant increase in its commercial mortgage production for 2025, totaling $4.2 billion. This marks a notable 25% year-over-year growth, with the fourth quarter alone contributing $1.5 billion to the total production.

data.title: Eagle Pharma sells Barhemsys (amisulpride) rights in U.S. to LXO Group, Paris, under OTCMKTS: EGRX, effective Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: Eagle Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (OTCMKTS: EGRX) based in Woodcliff Lake, N.J., disclosed today its decision to divest the marketing authorization for Barhemsys (amisulpride) in the U.S. The Company will transfer this authorization to LXO Group, headquartered in Paris, France. This strategic move signifies Eagle's focus on its core operations and expansion plans. The specifics of the deal, including financial terms and duration, were not publicly disclosed. The transaction is part of Eagle's larger business strategy and marks a significant development for both companies involved.
